description: Equity program dead-ideas registry (E2, 2026-07-20). Separate from crypto; no lesson cross-contamination.
failure_lessons: ROUND ZERO — PIPELINE VALIDATED, MAGNITUDE DISTRUSTED (2026-07-20): cross-sectional 12-1 momentum (long-only top-decile vs equal-weight universe) on the survivorship-corrected archive detects the known effect with the RIGHT SIGN and — critically — the predicted MOMENTUM-CRASH signature: -17.3%/yr in the 2020-21 rebound vs +28.9%/yr in 2024-26 trend. That crash pattern (Daniel-Moskowitz) is the mechanism showing itself, not a bug — the machinery TRANSFERS. But: pooled +14.9%/yr is FAR above the pre-registered 2-4%/yr band and significance is marginal (t=1.57, n=59), so the magnitude is NOT a deployable edge — inflated by 2024-26 narrow-bull concentration, possible delisting-haircut asymmetry on the benchmark, and high cross-regime variance. Founding discipline for the equity registry: the equal-weight-universe benchmark (drift null) is mandatory on every spec; trust DIRECTION and regime-conditioning, distrust raw magnitude; the crash skew must be priced into any capital model.

ROUND ONE — NO PRICE-FACTOR CANDIDATE (2026-07-23): four documented price/volume anomalies scored as long-only top-decile GROSS excess over the equal-weight liquid-universe benchmark, survivorship-corrected, 2021-26 (n=59mo). NONE clears the best-of-4 selection hurdle (~1.7t): momentum_12_1 +1.24%/mo t=1.57 (sub-threshold, concentrated in 2024-26 per identity test), reversal_1m +0.24% t=0.37, low_vol_60 -0.46% t=-0.95, high_52w_prox -0.24% t=-0.43. Reading: the top-500-liquid (large-cap-proxy) universe is efficient to SIMPLE price factors at monthly horizon by raw-excess. CAVEAT — low-vol was measured with the WRONG yardstick: the low-vol anomaly is RISK-ADJUSTED (Sharpe/drawdown), not raw excess; negative raw excess in a 2021-26 tech-bull is consistent with its known profile and does NOT falsify it (re-score risk-adjusted before verdict). Next probes: risk-adjusted low-vol; the real equity edges likely need fundamentals (value/quality, absent from the archive) or a smaller-cap universe (more anomaly juice, less liquidity).
